name: Sheng Man

sections.short-biography: Served Wu. Made war with Wei following the subjugation of Shu in 264.

	 Name Notes 
	Sometimes he also appears as Cheng Man.
sections.biography-collaborative-works:
A Wu officer. Immediately after Shu was destroyed by Wei in 264, he attacked Luo Xian of Ba Dong along with the likes of Bu Xie and Liu Ping under Lu Kang’s command.

Data taken from Koei’s “Romance of the Three Kingdoms IX”.

full_text:
Sheng Man 盛曼
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Sheng Man (盛曼). Served Wu. Made war with Wei following the subjugation of Shu in 264. Sheng Man was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.
